Custom CMS Development

Custom content management system development tailored to your specific business needs and content workflows.

Service Overview

Off-the-shelf CMS solutions don't always fit unique business requirements. My custom CMS development services create tailored content management solutions that perfectly align with your workflow, content strategy, and business objectives while providing the flexibility and control you need.

What's Included

Custom CMS Architecture

  • Tailored content modeling and structure
  • Custom field types and relationships
  • Role-based access control
  • Workflow and approval systems
  • Multi-language support (if needed)

User Experience Design

  • Intuitive admin interfaces
  • Custom dashboards and analytics
  • Streamlined content creation workflows
  • Mobile-responsive admin panels
  • User training and documentation

Technical Implementation

  • Headless or traditional CMS architecture
  • API development for content delivery
  • Third-party integrations
  • Performance optimization
  • Security implementation

Migration & Setup

  • Content migration from existing systems
  • User account setup and permissions
  • Training and onboarding
  • Documentation and best practices

CMS Technologies & Approaches

Headless CMS Solutions

  • Strapi - Open-source, highly customizable
  • Sanity - Real-time collaboration features
  • Contentful - Enterprise-grade scalability
  • Custom GraphQL APIs - Complete control and flexibility

Traditional CMS

  • WordPress with custom themes and plugins
  • Craft CMS - Developer-friendly and flexible
  • Drupal - Complex content relationships
  • Custom PHP/Node.js solutions

Modern Tech Stack

  • React/Vue.js admin interfaces
  • Node.js/PHP backend development
  • GraphQL/REST API architecture
  • Database design (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL)

Key Features We Can Build

Content Management

  • Visual page builders
  • Media library management
  • Content scheduling and publishing
  • Version control and revisions
  • SEO optimization tools

User Management

  • Role-based permissions
  • Multi-site management
  • User activity tracking
  • Custom user fields
  • SSO integration

Advanced Features

  • E-commerce integration
  • Multi-language content
  • Advanced search functionality
  • Custom reporting and analytics
  • Automated content workflows

Process

  1. Requirements Analysis - Understanding your content needs and workflows
  2. System Architecture - Designing the CMS structure and features
  3. UI/UX Design - Creating intuitive admin interfaces
  4. Development - Building the custom CMS solution
  5. Testing & QA - Ensuring reliability and performance
  6. Migration & Setup - Moving content and setting up users
  7. Training & Launch - User training and go-live support
  8. Ongoing Support - Maintenance and feature enhancements

Typical Timeline

Custom CMS development projects typically take 8-16 weeks, depending on complexity and feature requirements. I'll provide a detailed timeline after requirements analysis.

Who Benefits from Custom CMS?

  • Publishing Companies - Complex content workflows
  • E-commerce Businesses - Product management needs
  • Educational Institutions - Course and resource management
  • Healthcare Organizations - Compliance and security requirements
  • Marketing Agencies - Multi-client content management
  • Enterprise Companies - Integration with existing systems

Ongoing Support & Maintenance

  • Regular security updates
  • Feature enhancements
  • Performance optimization
  • User support and training
  • Backup and disaster recovery

Ready to Build Your Custom CMS?

Let's discuss your content management needs and create a solution that works perfectly for your organization. Contact me to start the conversation.

Let's work together

I'm currently available for full-time roles and select freelance projects.
